triage_rows.direction: tighten_the_outer_orchestration_loop and reopen the requested target when orchestration_loop_signal_mode rotates into tight_orchestration_loop
interrupt_the_outer_orchestration_loop immediately when orchestration_loop_signal_mode rotates into interrupt_orchestration_loop

interpretation: This is the narrowest orchestration-loop routing surface in the internal hot-news stack.
An outer orchestrator can stop here without reading lower orchestration packet layers unless it needs deeper detail.
